news.headline: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 8, 2024 before market open. Conference call at 10:30 am ET.
news.summary: In Calabasas, California, Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI), a prominent national brokerage firm focusing on commercial real estate investment sales, financing, and research services, revealed it is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The announcement will take place on Friday, November 8, 2024, before the commencement of the market activities. At 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, the company will conduct a webcast and a conference call to delve into the outcomes.

news.headline: Prepare your RV for winter with tips from Truma. Winter camping tips for all adventurers. #RV #WinterCamping #Truma
news.summary: ELKHART, Ind. - As winter approaches, with shorter days and decreasing temperatures, some may see it as the end of RV camping season. However, for many enthusiasts, year-round camping is a popular choice. Despite the weather, a significant number of people continue to partake in cold-weather activities.

news.headline: Health Net is the only US health plan to receive "Health Equity Accreditation Plus" for 2024, one of three plans in California ever to do so.
news.summary: Health Net, a Medi-Cal managed care health plan operating in California and part of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), was recently awarded prestigious Accreditation. This recognition makes Health Net one of just three plans in California to receive such an honor. The news was announced on October 17, 2024, in Sacramento.

news.headline: Thousands gather at Intrepid Museum in Manhattan to raise millions for lupus research at LRA's 2024 NYC Walk.
news.summary: On October 19, 2024, an event organized by the Lupus Research Alliance (LRA) will take place at the Intrepid Museum in Manhattan, New York. The event is expected to draw thousands of participants, including individuals affected by lupus and their supporters. The annual New York City Walk with Us to Cure Lupus aims to raise awareness and funds for lupus research.

news.headline: DIFF Charitable Eyewear appoints Alessandro Baronti as President of Global Wholesale. Baronti brings extensive sales leadership experience to the position.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, DIFF Charitable Eyewear disclosed the selection of Alessandro Baronti as the new President of Global Wholesale. With significant expertise in sales management and a keen interest in revolutionizing high-growth companies, Alessandro assumes control of the role.

news.headline: Eastside Golf launches holiday collection with six signature items debuting on Complex on Oct 18, full collection on website Oct 21.
news.summary: A new collection is being launched to celebrate the inspiration that golf brings to players of all levels. In a first-time move for the brand, six signature items from the collection will be available for early purchase exclusively on Complex beginning on October 18. The full collection will then be released on Eastside Golf's website on October 21. This launch is set to take place in New York City.

news.headline: Private equity firm TSG expands its portfolio ops with Brian Crandall as Managing Director, enhancing value-add capabilities.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a reputable private equity firm, TSG Consumer Partners, made public its plan to enhance its portfolio operations unit, TSG Vantage, by adding Brian Crandall as a Managing Director on October 15, 2024. This move underscores Vantage's strategic expansion efforts and strengthens its ability to provide value-added services. The group aids partner companies by offering strategic and operational support, mainly centered on commercial, operations, and talent management.

news.headline: Selectis Health announced Adam Desmond as the permanent CEO.
news.summary: Adam Desmond has been officially named the Chief Executive Officer of the company. The decision to permanently appoint him to this position was made after a thorough review process. Adam has been with the company for six years and has shown exceptional leadership skills. Under his guidance, the company has seen a 20% increase in revenue and a 15% growth in market share. The board of directors unanimously approved his appointment, citing his strategic vision and commitment to the company's success. Adam's permanent appointment is effective immediately, and he is eager to lead the company to continued growth and success in the future.

news.headline: WazirX will disclose 240,000 wallets and balances for debt restructure, emphasizing transparency.
news.summary: WazirX emphasized the importance of transparency by stating that it begins with disclosing every detail, even if it involves overwhelming data.

news.headline: XORTX announces US$1.5 million offering, selling 810,810 common shares at US$1.85/share & warrants for 810,810 shares.
news.summary: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a pharmaceutical company based in Calgary, Alberta, recently announced entering into securities purchase agreements with institutional investors for the sale of 810,810 common shares in a registered direct offering and common warrants to buy up to 810,810 common shares at a purchase price of US$1.85 per share. The Offering includes a concurrent private placement, where the common warrants will have an exercise price of US$2.18, be immediately exercisable, and expire five years from issuance. XORTX is focused on developing innovative therapies for progressive kidney disease. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol XRTX, on TSXV under XRTX, and on the Frankfurt exchange as ANU.

news.headline: Acrivon Therapeutics to showcase AP3 platform at scientific conferences in Germany and Spain, presenting data on ACR-368 and ACR-2316.
news.summary: A precision medicine company, Acrivon Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACRV), based in Watertown, Mass., is set to present data at two upcoming scientific congresses - the Human Proteome Organization (HUPO) World Congress in Dresden, Germany from October 20-24, 2024, and the EORTC-NCI-AACR (ENA) Symposium in Barcelona, Spain from October 23-25, 2024. The company will showcase the ability of its Acrivon Predictive Precision Proteomics (AP3) platform in facilitating the clinical development of ACR-368 and the discovery and design of ACR-2316. Acrivon focuses on creating drug candidates that align mechanistically with patients whose diseases are predicted to be sensitive to the specific treatment.

news.headline: NV5 receives $26M to enhance utility grid efficiency through geospatial services, covering 80,000 miles of distribution.
news.summary: NV5 Global, Inc., a technology and consulting solutions provider, has secured $26 million in geospatial contracts from top electric and gas utilities. The contracts are aimed at aiding utility infrastructure enhancements, asset management, and vegetation control, covering around 80,000 miles of energy distribution. The projects are slated for completion within the next year. NV5 will leverage its advanced artificial intelligence (AI) technology and exclusive geospatial data collection tools to provide project data, meeting the increasing energy needs in the U.S.

news.headline: Censys expands partner network by over 200% in 2024 to deliver solutions globally.
news.summary: Announcing its global expansion of the partner program, Censys, based in ANN ARBOR, Mich., on Oct. 17, 2024, revealed plans to deliver its innovative Threat Hunting and Attack Surface Management solutions to a worldwide audience. As a renowned provider in the industry, Censys aims to enhance its reach through partnering with more organizations internationally. This move signifies a significant step forward in promoting cybersecurity solutions on a global scale.

news.headline: Lightbridge to announce Q3 financial results on Oct 31, hosting conference call on Nov 1 at 11am ET.
news.summary: A technology company, Lightbridge Corporation (Nasdaq: LTBR) based in Reston, Va., is set to reveal its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024 on October 31, 2024, post-market closure. The company will convene a conference call on November 1st at 11:00 AM ET to engage with investors, shedding light on its financial outcomes and advancements in fuel development.

news.headline: Hydrofarm Holdings Group, Inc. announces CEO succession plan - Bill Toler to retire as CEO and become Executive Chairman with John Lindeman becoming CEO effective Jan 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Shoemakersville, Pennsylvania, on October 17, 2024, Hydrofarm Holdings Group, Inc. revealed its intentions for a leadership shift. Hydrofarm, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of hydroponics products for controlled environment agriculture, disclosed that Bill Toler, the current Chairman and CEO, will retire from the CEO position and assume the role of Executive Chairman of the Board starting January 1, 2025. John Lindeman, who presently serves as the Executive Vice President and CFO, is set to take over as the new CEO. Hydrofarm is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol HYFM.

news.headline: Acurx Pharmaceuticals will participate in Spartan Capital Investor Conference to showcase growth, foster investor engagement. Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: On October 17th, 2024, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP), a leading biopharmaceutical company, based in Staten Island, revealed plans for the development of a novel antibiotics class targeting challenging bacterial infections. Acurx stated that they are in the advanced stages of this project and are committed to providing effective solutions for these infections. The specific details and progress of this initiative were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Poseida Therapeutics and Roche collaborate on new CAR-T candidate for hematologic malignancies triggering $15 million milestone payment and extending Poseida's cash runway into early 2026. Poseida Cell Therapy R&D Day to take place on November 14.
news.summary: A $15 million milestone payment has been triggered for Poseida due to the nomination of their allogeneic, TSCM-rich dual CAR-T therapy for hematologic malignancies, such as multiple myeloma. This payment has extended Poseida's cash runway into early 2026. The Poseida Cell Therapy R&D Day is scheduled for Thursday, November 14 at 7 am PT.

news.headline: Intra-Cellular Therapies (Nasdaq: ITCI) to discuss Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 30, 2024, at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Intra-Cellular Therapies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ITCI), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in CNS disorder therapeutics, revealed plans for a conference call and live webcast discussion scheduled for 8:30 a.m. EST on October 30, 2024. The event aims to offer a corporate update and delve into the Company's financial performance for the quarter finishing on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: 1910 Genetics launches CANDID-CNS™ AI model predicting BBB permeability with an 83% success rate.
news.summary: Boston-based biotechnology company 1910 Genetics has introduced CANDID-CNS™, a new graph neural network designed to forecast the blood-brain barrier (BBB) permeability and distribution of small molecule drug candidates targeting central nervous system (CNS) illnesses. Equipped with a multimodal AI platform driven by lab automation, the technology boasts an impressive 83% accuracy rate in predictions.

news.headline: Jüsto, a Latin American online grocer, raises $70 million from General Atlantic and HSBC to fuel growth.
news.summary: A prominent online grocer in Latin America, Jüsto, operating in Mexico, Brazil, and Peru, has secured a total of USD $70 million in funding, comprising a USD $50 million equity investment led by General Atlantic and supplemented by other investors, along with about USD $20 million in debt organized by HSBC México. This substantial funding will enable Jüsto to expand its operations and capitalize on new opportunities in the market.

news.headline: NaaS Technology partners with charging station operator in Fujian Province, China, marking their first U.S.-listed EV service company.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) disclosed a significant collaboration with a top regional charging station operator in Fujian Province, marking a key milestone for the first U.S.-listed EV charging service company in China. This strategic partnership is aimed at bolstering the company's presence in the region and enhancing its service offerings to cater to the increasing demand for electric vehicle charging infrastructure.

news.headline: SAIHEAT signs MoU to enhance leadership in Middle East nuclear & SMR markets, aiming to boost competitiveness globally.
news.summary: SAIHEAT Limited (formerly known as SAI.TECH Global Corporation), listed on NASDAQ as SAIH and SAITW, has revealed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) centred around HEATNUC products on October 17, 2024. This initiative is geared towards strengthening capabilities in product innovation and promotion. The MoUs have been structured to amplify the firm's competitiveness across the Middle East and worldwide markets. By executing this strategic decision, SAIHEAT aims to progress its localization tactic in the area, thereby reinforcing its market stance and broadening its reach.

news.headline: Walmart offers a Thanksgiving meal for less than $7 per person, with savings compared to last year1. Customers can donate to loved ones or Salvation Army.
news.summary: In Arkansas, retail giant Walmart has unveiled its holiday meal offering with impressive discounts on popular food items. This year, customers can expect earlier access to these savings, with prices even lower than the previous year. Additionally, Walmart is introducing a new initiative where customers can gift meals to family and friends nationwide, as well as donate a complete meal to their neighborhood Salvation Army unit. Given the current focus on food prices, these efforts are aimed at bringing more joy to customers during the festive season.

news.headline: ShiftPixy, Inc. buys TurboScale for $150 million. TurboScale is known for its AI tech. #Acquisition #GigEconomy #Business
news.summary: In Miami, ShiftPixy, Inc. (Nasdaq: PIXY), a Florida staffing enterprise, has acquired TurboScale, an AI technology company, for $150 million. ShiftPixy is known for its disruptive platform that supports employment in the Gig Economy. TurboScale specializes in scalable GPU cloud infrastructure and AI model deployment. This deal marks a significant move for ShiftPixy in expanding its technological capabilities and presence in the market.

news.headline: Uniti Group Inc. in Little Rock, Ark. got a 20-year contract worth 90 route miles of infrastructure in Montgomery, Alabama.
news.summary: Arkansas-based company Uniti Group Inc. has revealed a new 20-year agreement with a key hyperscale customer in Montgomery, Alabama, a part of its 30+ enterprise markets. They plan to build 90 route miles of multi-conduit systems and high-strand count fiber cables as part of this deal. The contract signifies a significant development for Uniti and demonstrates their commitment to expanding their infrastructure, bringing valuable services to their clients.

news.headline: Life Time renews alliance with NASM to support personal training growth. Commitment to professional development.
news.summary: In Chanhassen, Minnesota on October 17, 2024, Life Time disclosed news of renewing its partnership with the National Academy of Sports Medicine (NASM). The collaboration, under the stock symbol LTH on NYSE, ensures ongoing support for personal trainers with professional growth prospects. This alliance reflects the company's dedication to fostering development in the fitness industry, emphasizing the importance of certified training programs for its personnel.

news.headline: YETI Holdings to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024. Conference call at 8:00 am ET. Dial 800-717-1738.
news.summary: YETI Holdings, Inc. is set to release its third quarter fiscal year 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, prior to the market opening. A conference call will follow at 8:00 a.m. ET for discussion of the results. To join the call, investors and analysts can dial 800-717-1738 (international callers dial 646-307-1865) about 10 minutes before the start. YETI is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol YETI.

news.headline: Xometry appoints Roy Azevedo to its Board of Directors, expanding the company's leadership.
news.summary: In North Bethesda, Maryland, on October 17, 2024, Xometry (NASDAQ: XMTR) disclosed the addition of Roy Azevedo to their Board of Directors. Xometry operates as a global AI-driven platform uniting corporate purchasers with manufacturing service providers.

news.headline: SharkNinja Inc. (NYSE: SN) to release Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 31, 2024. Conference call at 8:30AM ET. Webcast at ir.sharkninja.com.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, SharkNinja, Inc. (NYSE: SN), a renowned global product design and technology company based in NEEDHAM, Mass., revealed that it will be disclosing its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 31, 2024, prior to the market's opening. A live earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. The webcast link will be accessible on the Investor Relations segment of the Company's website at ir.sharkninja.com. For participation and further details, interested individuals are encouraged to visit the provided website.

news.headline: Insmed (Nasdaq: INSM) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31st, aiming to deliver innovative therapies for patients.
news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey, on October 17, 2024, Insmed Incorporated (Nasdaq: INSM), a leading global biopharmaceutical company dedicated to improving patient lives, revealed plans to unveil its latest developments. Insmed focuses on providing innovative therapies for patients battling severe illnesses.

news.headline: Microchip's RTG4™ FPGAs achieve highest space qualification, powering missions for over 60 years.
news.summary: For over six decades, Microchip has been at the forefront of powering space missions with its high-quality solutions.

news.headline: 98% of Sunnova's solar systems in Florida survived Hurricanes Milton and Helene, showcasing their resilience for 19,000 customers.
news.summary: In Houston, Sunnova Energy International, Inc., a notable energy services company (NYSE: NOVA), reported that 98% of its robust Sunnova rooftop solar systems remained unscathed after Hurricanes Milton and Helene, showcasing their resilience. The systems endured no damage for roughly 19,000 Florida customers amidst Hurricane Milton and over 13,000 during Hurricane Helene.

news.headline: Hanwha Vision will showcase video surveillance solutions for data centers at DICE West 2024 in San Jose on Dec 3.
news.summary: Hanwha Vision, a leading global provider of vision solutions, is set to showcase its data center products at the upcoming Data Center Investment Conference & Expo (DICE) West on December 3rd in San Jose. This event will delve into the world of data centers and their significance in the industry.

news.headline: PACT and EEI partner to accelerate charging infrastructure for class 6-8 electric trucks in the US. New MOU signed.
news.summary: A new agreement has been signed between the Powering America’s Commercial Transportation (PACT) coalition and the Edison Electric Institute (EEI) to boost the deployment of infrastructure for medium- and heavy-duty zero-emission vehicles (ZEVs) across the U.S. PACT is dedicated to promoting education and advocacy in this area. The memorandum of understanding (MOU) aims to accelerate the nationwide adoption of ZEVs. EEI represents all U.S. investor-owned electric companies and the collaboration is intended to support the shared objective of expanding ZEV deployment.

news.headline: Mobix Labs sees 426% revenue growth in 2024 under leadership of Jimmy Peterson and David Aldrich. Acquired 3 companies.
news.summary: A California-based company, Mobix Labs Inc. (Nasdaq: MOBX), specializing in advanced connectivity solutions for defense, military, and communications sectors and led by industry veterans Jimmy Peterson and Dave Aldrich, has reported impressive financial progress. The company saw a substantial 426% rise in revenue over the past fiscal year. Within the last ten months, Mobix Labs has gone public and disclosed three notable acquisitions as part of its growth strategy.

news.headline: Ontario Airport had record September with 600k+ travelers; 5.2M in 2024 so far.
news.summary: The airport in Southern California, Ontario International Airport (ONT), greeted 5.2 million air passengers within the initial 9 months of 2024. In the city of Ontario, California, on October 17, 2024, officials revealed that ONT hosted over 600,000 travelers just last month alone, marking it as the busiest September ever recorded at the airport.

news.headline: Yamaha introduces hydrogen technology for recreational craft by 2024 IBEX, aiming for sustainability and innovation.
news.summary: In KENNESAW, Ga., Grant Suzuki, Yamaha U.S. Marine Business Unit Chief of Technology, emphasized the importance of hydrogen technology in Yamaha's sustainability and innovation efforts. By partnering with industry pioneers and enhancing hydrogen propulsion systems, Yamaha is venturing into carbon-neutral marine products to maintain their renowned performance and reliability. Suzuki reiterated the commitment to exploring new avenues while preserving Yamaha's uncompromised standards in the industry.

news.headline: Ford Pro introduces new digital tools like E-Switch Assist to help businesses integrate electric vehicles.
news.summary: Ford Pro™, the commercial arm of Ford Motor Company, has launched new digital resources such as E-Switch Assist to aid businesses in transitioning their vehicles to electric models. These tools are designed to facilitate the integration of electric vans and trucks into fleets to align with business goals and optimize performance. The initiative, "E-Switch Assist: Are Electric Vehicles Right for Your Organization?" serves as a crucial starting point for companies looking to electrify their operations, enabling them to assess the suitability of electric vehicles for their specific needs. This move by Ford Pro™ is part of the company's dedication to supporting commercial electrification efforts, aiming to enhance efficiency and sustainability.

news.headline: FDA approves VYALEV for advanced Parkinson's patients. First subcutaneous 24-hour levodopa infusion. Superior results in "on" time without dyskinesia.
news.summary: VYALEV™ is now available as the initial subcutaneous 24-hour continuous infusion delivering levodopa-based therapy for supporting patients with advanced Parkinson's disease. Adults receiving VYALEV experienced notable progress in "on" time free of challenging dyskinesia, surpassing outcomes seen with oral treatments.

news.headline: WisdomTree launches Say platform for Q3 2024 earnings, available before call on October 25th at 11am ET.
news.summary: WisdomTree, a leading investment firm, unveiled its new stockholder Q&A platform, Say, in preparation for the upcoming Q3 earnings call on October 25th at 11am Eastern Time. This innovative platform aims to facilitate communication and engagement between shareholders and the company. Investors can now utilize Say to participate in the Q&A session and gain insights into the company's performance. This marks a significant advancement in enhancing shareholder involvement in corporate affairs.

news.headline: ChemPoint LLC partners with PLZ Corp for food release agents distribution, strenghtening Univar's position as solutions provider.
news.summary: In Downers Grove, Illinois, on October 17, 2024, ChemPoint LLC, a subsidiary of Univar Solutions LLC, a prominent global solutions provider for specialty ingredients and chemicals, partnered with PLZ Corp. The collaboration brings together industry leaders to enhance services for users.

news.headline: Pending U.S. home sales increase by 3.2% year over year in biggest spike in 3 years, rising in 34 metros.
news.summary: In Seattle, pending U.S. home sales experienced a notable 3.2% year-over-year increase over a four-week period ending on October 13. This surge marks the largest growth in three years, as indicated by a recent report from Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a technology-driven real estate firm. The upward trend in home sales is particularly observable in 34 out of the 50 largest U.S. metro areas, with significant spikes reported in California and Portland, OR. Market experts attribute this recent boost in sales to improving mortgage rates.

news.headline: Dstillery and Equativ team up to enhance audience targeting. Partnership boosts access to advanced solutions.
news.summary: In a press release dated October 17, 2024, it was announced that Dstillery, a prominent company specializing in AI-powered ad targeting, has entered into a strategic partnership with Equativ, a leading global independent ad platform. This collaboration is aimed at enhancing access to cutting-edge audience solutions. The partnership is anticipated to offer advertisers enhanced capabilities in reaching their target audiences efficiently. The alliance between Dstillery and Equativ signifies a key development in the ad tech industry, with potential benefits for both companies and their clients.

news.headline: Cyera buys Trail Security for $162M, enhancing AI-driven data security; expands its DSPM platform after $1.4B valuation.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Cyera, a prominent AI-driven data security company, revealed its acquisition of Trail Security, a cutting-edge data loss prevention (DLP) company, for a substantial sum of $162 million. This move represents a significant advancement for Cyera, a relatively young cybersecurity unicorn boasting a valuation exceeding $1.4 billion. This strategic acquisition is pivotal for Cyera as it progresses in enhancing its AI-powered platform. By combining Trail's advanced DLP expertise with Cyera’s Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) platform, the company is poised to strengthen its core product offering.

news.headline: Global Surgical Robots Market projected to reach $32.33 billion by 2031 with a 13.4% CAGR growth. Advancements in technology driving demand.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by SkyQuest predicting that the Surgical Robots Market will reach $32.33 billion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.4% over the forecast period. Advancements in robotic technologies and increased use of digital technologies in the healthcare sector are expected to drive demand for surgical robots. Factors such as the rising workload on medical professionals and the growing acceptance of robotic surgeries are also anticipated to contribute to the market's growth. In 2023, the market revenue was reported at $9.53 billion. The report covers 206 pages, 95 tables, and 76 figures, providing insights into the market landscape, growth factors, and trends.

news.headline: Lionsgate and Lionsgate Studios to release Q2 earnings for fiscal 2025 on Nov 7, 2024. Market close info announced for investors.
news.summary: Today, in Santa Monica, California, and Vancouver, British Columbia, Lionsgate and Lionsgate Studios revealed their plans to unveil the financial results for the fiscal 2025 second quarter that concluded on September 30, 2024, following the closure of the market. Lionsgate's stocks on NYSE, LGF.A and LGF.B, along with Lionsgate Studios on Nasdaq, LION, are eagerly anticipated to experience impacts post the release.

news.headline: CoinFlip partners with Yesway and Allsup's convenience stores, adding digital currency kiosks to 45 locations across 5 states.
news.summary: A global digital currency platform, CoinFlip, headquartered in Chicago, has revealed a collaboration with Yesway, a rapidly expanding convenience store chain based in Fort Worth, Texas. This partnership brings CoinFlip's bitcoin ATMs to 45 Yesway and Allsup's stores across several states, including Texas, South Dakota, New Mexico, Wyoming, and Iowa. Yesway, known as one of the nation's swiftest growing convenience store chains in the Southwest and Midwest regions, will now host these digital currency kiosks to cater to customers interested in cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Steel Dynamics plans to release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 17, 2024. They are one of the largest steel producers in North America. #STLD
news.summary: In Fort Wayne, Indiana, on October 17, 2024, Steel Dynamics, Inc., a prominent steel manufacturer and metal recycler in North America, shared plans to unveil their financial results for the Third Quarter of 2024 post-market hours on Wednesday, October. The company operates as one of the largest steel producers domestically and boasts a notable presence in metal recycling. Steel Dynamics, Inc. can be found on the NASDAQ/GS under the ticker symbol STLD.

news.headline: Global Molded Pulp Packaging Market set to reach USD 6,067.47 million by 2032, driven by demand for eco-friendly solutions. Over 8,000 players compete for market share. Rising concern over plastic waste spurs growth. Manufacturers innovate to enhance properties.
news.summary: The global molded pulp packaging market is experiencing significant growth due to the rising demand for sustainable packaging solutions. The market is segmented by molded type, source, product, end use, and geography, with a total value estimated in USD billions. There are over 8,000 large-scale manufacturers globally, including well-known players like Molpack Corporation Ltd, YFY Jupiter, and Smurfit Kappa, who focus on product innovation and sustainability to capture market share. The market is driven by the trend towards eco-friendly alternatives to plastic, leading to increased demand for molded pulp packaging. Government regulations and consumer awareness are also boosting market growth. Manufacturers are focusing on enhancing the material's properties, creating opportunities in sectors beyond food packaging. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Alkami (Nasdaq: ALKT) to reveal Q3 2024 financial results for cloud-based banking services provider in the US.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas on October 17, 2024, Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT) revealed plans to release its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluded in September. Alkami is a prominent provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions for U.S. financial institutions.
